rationale: The "Can you win?" challenge framing is genre-agnostic and the casual audience overlaps, but the bus parking puzzle hook is fundamentally a top-down logic/pathing concept that has zero read-through to Helix Jump's vertical bounce-and-rotate loop — recreating it would require fabricating gameplay that doesn't exist in the app, risking misleading-ad penalties. Palette (muted greys/greens/blues) also clashes with Helix's neon high-contrast identity. Only worth borrowing the text-overlay challenge formula ("WHY THIS LEVEL IS SO HARD") over authentic Helix footage, not the puzzle concept itself.
